title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 2–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Children as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ones who totally outclassed the Castle Guards!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's your deal?! You're behind the kidnappings, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sound like enel or one of those celestial dragons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would a God go after the children of Elbaf?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A child like you should know when to hold their tongue...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A clean abduction isn't feasible, given the sheer size of our quarry.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our only option to ensure passage to the Holy Land...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was to have them walk themselves over here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Holy Land? You mean Mary Geoise?!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
